student_path_note: Spec requested Qwen/Qwen3-7B-Instruct but that repo does not exist on Hugging Face (404). Qwen3's smallest dense Instruct variant is Qwen3-8B, which shares the Qwen3 tokenizer (vocab 151936) with Qwen3-14B and DocWain-14B-v2 — so KL is valid. The CLI default in distillation.py still reads 'Qwen/Qwen3-7B-Instruct' per spec; the dry-run used Qwen3-8B explicitly.
green_light_reasoning: All 10 micro-steps completed with finite loss values; vocab aligned; optimizer step succeeded at micro-step 8 (first completed grad-accum cycle); peak VRAM 64.3 GB fits the A100-80GB with ~15 GB headroom. Ready for the real 18h run once models/DocWain-14B-v5 is available after Layer 3 (DPO) completes.
notes_for_real_run: Use max_seq_length=4096 per spec (dry-run used 2048 to leave headroom). With bf16 grad checkpointing + 8-bit AdamW this should still fit.

Teacher cache auto-populates on first epoch. With 31K rows at ~1.1s per miss, first-epoch budget ≈ 9.5 h; subsequent reads are from disk (~ms). Plan: cache warming may dominate the 18h window if corpus exceeds 60K rows — consider warming cache in advance.
Swap Qwen3-8B → whichever Qwen3 small-dense Qwen ships that has vocab 151936; CLI default stays 'Qwen/Qwen3-7B-Instruct' per spec.
Checkpoint cadence: every 4 h by default, under models/DocWain-7B-v5/checkpoints/t_<unix>/. Final save overwrites models/DocWain-7B-v5/ itself.
